highlights.text: I wrote on Wednesday at 4pm: “My general lean if I had to give one is ES can retest 6818-22 again.
I wrote at 4pm Thursday: “ES started a relief bounce leg today and its ability to continue depends on ES holding 6818-22 My general lean is it does.
I wrote on Friday: “My general lean is to defer to the trend.
Two of these building blocks are what I call the two siblings: “Elevator down sell” being the first, and short squeeze being the second.
Last Wednesday we saw a substantial elevator down sell and ES - for the first time in a month - sold from open to close.
The trick is the short squeeze only occurs when ES puts in my core setup: The Failed Breakdown.

post_title: The Holiday Rally Has Begun In SPX. How Much More Gas Does It Have? December 23 Plan
